summary: Updated account configuration to reflect changes in business hours, on-call technician, and ServiceTitan integration constraints. The agent will now route emergency calls to Jason Park, mention the service maintenance plan to non-emergency callers, and not auto-schedule jobs for any commercial clients. These changes aim to improve the overall customer experience and ensure seamless integration with Arctic Air HVAC's systems.
